title: Inventory Beacon
description: Turn your inventory into a portable source of power with Inventory Beacon!
body:
This mod adds a unique item — the Inventory Beacon — allowing you to open a beacon-like GUI right from your inventory. Simply place an ingot (iron, gold, diamond, emerald, netherite) into the slot, then select the potion effect you want with a click. (it's like a portable beacon)

 

## Features
Intuitive GUI similar to the vanilla beacon, accessible from an inventory item

Five cosumable types: Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, Netherite, each granting different effect durations and strengths

Multiple potion effects selectable via buttons (e.g., Speed, Strength, Regeneration)

Automatic consumption of the catalyst item when applying the effect

Easy to use — perfect for adventurers who want buffs without placing a beacon block

![UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/284fac34c0a76b87a90c8c70e8d4fe49674fc461.png)

## Crafting

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f86f8d0dadf990c48a3cfc186281272323e3c3d5.png)
 

## Compatibility
Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge(For the moment)

## Notes
This mod is under active development and will receive more effects and options in future updates. Feedback is welcome!
